comments.text:
Mihai Nitu Cred ca am fost destul de politicos si clar in demersul meu, necomentand!
Am dorit doar ca lumea sa aiba si o alta perspectiva asupra lucrurilor!
App de remarca ta cu verificatul...tu ai verificat sau lumea trebuie sa se informeze doar din sursele agreate de catre tine?
Sarbatori fericite!

PS-stim cu totii ca Justitia este o hazna, in buna parte raspunzand comenzilor politice, dar te intreb unde era distinsa doamna (si chiar tu!) care a aparut subit dupa documentar cand Zegrean, fost sef CCR, a dat erata tot NOAPTEA, ca sa-l scape pe Basescu de demitere si unde era dupa anularea alegerilor de anul trecut, chiar in timpul referendumului, in noua formula a CCR, condusa de catre Enache?
Sau, cand, din statistici europene, rezulta clar ca suntem 'campioni' la cauze pierdute la CEDO (cine plateste despagubirile de pe urma deciziilor proaste ale judecatorilor?) sau cand multi penali scapa de reclusiune si confiscarea averilor, pentru ca distinsii magistrati fac jocuri mizerabile si faptele se prescriu?
A fost foarte bun salariul pe care l-a luat cu doua maini, este?
De ce nu a iesit in 'piata publica' pana acum?
Sper sa reflectezi serios si sa nu mai arunci cu noroi si glume de gradinita cu presa pe care nu o agreezi !

comments.text:
Buna ziua! Cunosc cumva ca ceea ce susțin aceasta dna judecător si colegii ei care au apărut in reportajul Recorder este adevărat. O doamna care este aproape de vârstă mea, eu am 51 de ani, este magistrat la CAB. Ei asa lucrează cum spune dna aceasta. Nu au nici un fel de libertate în a aplica legea, cum ar fi normal. 
Niciodată, niciodata, niciodată n-as fi putut sa lucrez in astfel de condiții. Munca mea, deciziile mele profesionale, respectul pentru ceea ce fac sunt obligatorii pentru a nu o lua razna in viata grea pe care o trăim. 
Sa le fie usor magistraților! Sa nu ajungă in ochii media așa cum suntem noi medicii de ani de zile! Eu stiu cum e sa fii paria societatii atunci cand tot ce faci este sa salvezi copii cu mâinile goale sau cu toate cele necesare unui act medical corect. :)

posts.text:
Acest documentar de două ore, care comprimă o muncă de investigație de peste un an și jumătate, încearcă să explice mecanismele complicate prin care sistemul judiciar, un pilon cheie al oricărui stat democratic, a ajuns să fie capturat de un grup de interese format din magistrați și politicieni.

Într-o formă simplificată, pactul dintre cele două tabere arată așa: politicul a oferit legi care au creat o organizare piramidală a sistemului de justiție, punând toată puterea în mâinile unui grup restrâns de magistrați, iar această mână de magistrați a oferit la schimb o justiție care nu-i mai deranjează pe cei puternici.

Mărturiile pe care le-am adunat din interiorul sistemului de justiție și pe care le prezentăm în acest material sunt de o gravitate fără precedent. Ele vorbesc despre dosare de mare corupție în care judecătorilor li se sugerează să ia decizii favorabile inculpaților, despre încălcarea flagrantă a principiului repartizării aleatorii a dosarelor prin schimbarea discreționară a completurilor de judecată, despre cum magistrații care nu se supun sunt marginalizați, hăituiți prin anchete ale Inspecției Judiciare și uneori chiar excluși din magistratură.

Consecințele acestor realități dramatice ne afectează viețile tuturor, pentru că o societate democratică nu poate supraviețui fără o justiție independentă: https://lnkd.in/dvRbRRiQ

comments.text: Documentarul Recorder „Justiție capturată” este o radiografie dureroasăa unui sistem care ar fi trebuit să fie ultimul bastion al statului de drept din Romania. Corupția din justiție s-a extins în ultimii ani, s-a adaptat și a prins rădăcini adânci, infiltrând mecanismele care ar fi trebuit să o combată.Ceea ce vedem nu mai sunt derapaje izolate, ci un fenomen sistemic, bine protejat de rețele de influență, tăceri complice și mecanisme de autoapărare. O justiție capturată înseamnă cetățeni lipsiți de apărare, încredere distrusă și o democrație slăbită din temelii. În fața unei asemenea realități, tăcerea și amânarea nu mai sunt opțiuni. Președintele României și Prim-ministrul au obligația morală și instituțională de a acționa imediat, ferm și transparent, în limitele Constituției, pentru a declanșa o curățare reală și profundă a sistemului judiciar. Nu reforme de fațadă, nu schimbări cosmetice, ci măsuri care să redea justiției independența, credibilitatea și rolul său fundamental în societate.Fără o justiție curată, nu poate exista nici stat de drept, nici viitor democratic autentic. „Justiție capturată” nu este doar un documentar, este un semnal de alarmă pe care nu ne mai putem permite să îl ignorăm! Felicitări realizatorilor!

comments.text: Ați descoperit și voi frunzele unui copac. Rădăcina și trunchiul sunt din  sistemul de putere de dinainte de 1989. Trebuia să ieșiți în stradă în ianuarie 1990 când unii jurnaliști de investigație ai vremii au pus la îndoială  autenticitatea Revoluției și a emanatului ei principal, Ion Iliescu, și să cereți lustrație, cum au cerut polonezii și au obținut-o. Acum e prea târziu și vă confruntați cu efecte de ordin 3-4.

resharedPost.text:
📊 Open Telemetry: What? Why? How? with Alexandru Olariu

Join Alexandru-Răzvan Olariu, a seasoned software engineer and solution architect at Microsoft, as he takes you through an insightful session on Open Telemetry – the industry-standard in observability.

In this presentation, Alexandru will cover:

👉 What Open Telemetry is and why it's essential for modern software systems.
👉 How to instrument your software to produce Open Telemetry data.
👉 A bonus dive into data visualization using Grafana, an industry-leading tool for querying and visualizing observability data, including integration with tools like Loki and Tempo.
Open Telemetry, a CNCF project, is a game-changer in observability, and Alexandru will show you how to harness its full potential to enhance your software's performance and monitoring capabilities.

If you're working with cloud infrastructure, microservices, or observability, this session is perfect for you. Don’t miss out!

posts.text:
I'm happy to present to open-source enthusiasts and computer science students about the intricacies of OpenTelemetry and how it can be leveraged to build efficient and scalable systems.

I'll also showcase how telemetry data can be fed into a data visualization tool like Grafana Labs' Grafana with the help of the `grafana-lgtm` docker container stack.

Thank you for this opportunity, Răzvan Deaconescu and ROSEdu.
Thank you to everyone who contributes to the open-source space.

resharedPost.text:
💡 Mentor Monday: Alexandru-Răzvan Olariu 💡
 
Meet Alexandru, a Software Engineer at Microsoft with over 3 years of experience across various cloud-computing roles. As a GMI mentor, Alexandru had the opportunity to mentor Mohammed from Rwanda, supporting him in his transition from university to a meaningful career in social impact.
 
"Transitioning from university life to professional life always comes with uncertainties: do I want to perform in this industry? Maybe there is another industry that would work better for me?" Alexandru shares. "For me, pairing up with Mohammed meant a new experience: I was able to offer him the knowledge and possible answers I would have looked for when I was younger. It was a pleasure to help him in his transition—he's been documenting every important milestone and is now much more confident about the path he wants to take."
 
Thank you, Alexandru, for supporting our mission and for guiding future change-makers like Mohammed to career success! 🌍🚀
 
#MentorMonday #GMI #Microsoft #Mentorship #CareerDevelopment #GlobalImpact

posts.text:
This post is dedicated to my past employer, Ubisoft, and to my time spent working as a QA/QC engineer for the `Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora` video game.

I am thrilled to witness the release of the game and the positive reviews that have come along. Avatar is a vast franchise, spanning many fields of creativity.

A big thanks goes to Ubisoft Romania (Bucharest studio) for having me work on such a masterpiece game. I want to extend this appreciation to my manager at that time, Andrei-Claudiu Maracineanu-Manolescu for believing in me since the first day. You have my sincere appreciation.

My tenure at Ubisoft was essential for my career growth.
Thank you for having me be part of the journey.

P.S: If you've completed the game, you can find my name in the credits section dedicated to the Bucharest Ubisoft studio.

#Ubisoft #Avatar

resharedPost.text:
Hype Cycle for AI in 2023

Two areas that might be relatively less well-known, but are also quite interesting to check:

◼ Neurosymbolic AI - combines the strengths of symbolic AI and neural networks. Symbolic AI is based on the idea of representing knowledge in a formal way, using symbols and rules based on the use of logic and mathematics.

Neurosymbolic AI uses neural networks to learn the weights of symbolic rules, which allows it to make inferences and draw conclusions in a more precise and accurate way than other approaches, such as machine learning.

Google's LaMDA and DeepMind's AlphaFold are two of the sucessful use cases. LaMDA uses it to understand and generate natural language; AlphaFold uses it to predict the structure of proteins.

◼ First-principles AI / Physics-informed AI - based on the idea that the laws of physics are fundamental and can be used to understand and predict the behavior of the world.

FPAI models are typically built by combining mathematical models of the physical world with ML algorithms. The ML algorithms are used to learn the parameters of the mathematical models, which are then used to make predictions.

Climate modeling, medical diagnosis, energy production, etc, are some potential use cases of FPAI.

Image credit to Gartner

#data #datascience #ml #ai

posts.text:
Is this the end of the 5-day week? 👀
 
 
The results are in and the report tells us that the UK’s four-day week pilot was a huge success! 🎉
 
Involving 61 companies and around 2,900 workers, this is the world’s largest four-day week trial to date. 
 
 Quick facts:

🤸‍♂️ 92% of the participating employers are sticking with the four-day week
 
 🤸‍♂️ Company revenue rose by 1.4% on average
 
 🤸‍♂️ 96% of workers prefer the four-day week
 
 🤸‍♂️ Employee stress levels dropped by 39%
 
 🤸‍♂️ Employee burnout rates fell by 71%
 
 🤸‍♂️ 54% of workers felt a reduction in negative emotions
 
 🤸‍♂️60% of employees with care responsibilities saw an improvement to their work-life balance, and 62% reported a positive impact to their social lives
 
 🤸‍♂️ 48% of employees feel more satisfied than when they first started
 
 🤸‍♂️ Sick days plummeted by 65%
 
 🤸‍♂️ Staff resignations dropped by 57%

By the end of the trial, 46% of workers said they’d only accept a five-day week job if they received a pay increase, and 15% said that no amount of money could entice them return to a five-day schedule.
 
Hard as some will most definitely try, you simply can’t argue with those stats! And for those who do wish to air their concerns, there are a couple of things worth noting first:
 
 👉 One size doesn’t fit all, which is why participating firms designed a policy tailored to factors such as their industry, organisational challenges, departmental structures, and company culture.
 
 This means a variety of four-day weeks were created, from the classic ‘Friday off’ model, to alternative structures like ‘staggered’, ‘decentralised’, ‘annualised’, and ‘conditional’.
 
 👉 To avoid any biased data, companies who took part come from a range of sectors and vary in size and headcount. 
 
So, what’s your verdict? Does today mark the beginning of the end of the five-day work week? Let us know your thoughts below, and be sure to click the link in the comments to read the full report! 👇

#flexacareers #fourdayweek #4dayworkweek #employmenttrends #hr #data #work #hiring #recruitment #culture #

comments.text: This is BS. You will never outcompete those who are the same good as you but work more. The more ambitious your goals are, the longer hours you will work. But if you want a regular salary and a great family/work balance, sure, 4 days a week may work; in a rich society; for some time.

article.title: I earned the Epic Week to Week badge on Pluralsight

posts.text:
As the end of the year concludes, I am happy to say that I've achieved a streak of 15 back-to-back weeks where I've logged on Pluralsight to hit my study targets.

In this year, I've:
- followed 18 content authors.
- watched ~150 hours of video content.
- honed my knowledge in Networking, .NET and Software Development Lifecycle.

I've also did 2 Skill IQ tests this year: 
- Networking Fundamentals: Expert with 214 points.
- Building web applications with React: Expert with 201 points.

Thank you Theodor Cara for the trust you've given me in this learning journey. Sylvia Lau - carry on the torch in 2023!

#pluralsight #skilling #learneveryday #networking #react

article.title: I’m so happy with my IELTS score. 🎉Thank you, @IDP Education Ltd!

posts.text:
I am proud to announce that I've successfully completed the IELTS Academic examination with an overall score (listening + reading + writing + speaking) of 8 out of 9.

IELTS is accepted by more government agencies, educational institutions, and professional bodies than any other English-language test in the world.
IELTS Academic examination assesses your English-language proficiency at an academic level to determine whether you are ready to study at a post graduate level, or work in a professional setting.

#ielts #examination #language

author.occupation: Software Engineer

posts.text:
I've successfully completed the learning path "Become a C++ Developer" from LinkedIn Learning, a learning path which consists of over 17 hours of C++ theory and in-depth exercises!

My favorite module of the learning path was and still is "Web Servers and APIs Using C++", by Troy Miles.

The module was outstanding, I've learnt how to create and automate Web Servers with C++, deploy resources using Docker, include HTML5, CSS3 and PHP elements and, last but not least, integrate external resources such as MongoDB to the Web Servers.

I'm very grateful for everything that I've learnt and this is just the start!

I recommend the learning path "Become a C++ Developer" for every C++ passionate programmer and for everyone else who would like to enrichen their C++ knowledge.

Link to the LinkedIn Learning Path: https://lnkd.in/eW3dXWz

Thank you, everyone!

#developer #docker #programming #cplusplus #objectorientedprogramming #linkedinlearning
